ValidationRule.description: Requires at least 1 external attendee to be added to an IL
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: NOT(Bypass_Validation__c) && ISBLANK(leaseworks__Meeting_Attendee_1__c) && NOT( ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Type_Of_Interaction__c, "Earnings Call") || ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Type_Of_Interaction__c, "Commercial Weekly Summary Note") || ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Type_Of_Interaction__c, "Contracts/Legal Weekly Summary Note") || (ISNEW() && ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Discussion_Type__c, "Technical")) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: At least 1 external attendee should be added to this meeting type.
